news.title: Consensys unknowingly outsourced developer work to North Korean
news.summary: Through an introduction with a “reputable third-party service provider,“ the company took on a developer who, as part of an investigation, was revealed to be tied to North Korea.

news.title: i hooked up live crypto/stock markets into an RTS game, result: 24/7 chaos
news.summary:
maybe some of you folks are gamers, but i'm in love with Beyond All Reason, OS RTS game. huge unit roster and known for truly epic battles

i hooked up the game engine and AI players to 4 live price feeds, aggregated from various CEX/DEXs

  • S&P500/USD
  • GOLD/USD
  • BTC/USD (inb4 bitcoin isn't crypto; stfu)

  • ETH/USD

    resource generation for each player is based on actual order volume of buys and sells
